failedAssertions.reason: Glossary tooltip wrapping is missing on article detail content; contract requirement for <a class='tooltip'> title/href behavior is not met.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked: no hidden article fixture exists in the shared dataset, so hidden-article exclusion behavior could not be validated without creating temporary data.

appliedUpdates.description: Added rerun learnings for hidden-article fixture requirements (VAL-DETAIL-010), canonical glossary fixture route for VAL-DETAIL-008, and low-risk pagination fixtureing for VAL-SEARCH-004.

frictions.description: agent-browser errors command returned empty output when there were no errors, so explicit 'none' results were recorded in each assertion.
frictions.resolution: Captured console checks after each assertion flow and treated empty output as no console errors.

frictions.description: Guidance references an article title with URI-like text ending in 'and-data-structures', but direct navigation to that URI returned the not-found page. The assertion was validated by navigating from the homepage article link instead.
frictions.resolution: Used homepage link for 'Introduction to Algorithms and Data Structures' to reach canonical URI /article/introduction-to-algorithms.

frictions.description: agent-browser semantic locators for Keywords/Search were ambiguous because both header quick-search and advanced search form expose similar labels.
frictions.resolution: Switched to snapshot refs (@e9/@e20) for deterministic targeting of advanced search controls.

frictions.description: agent-browser network export returned "No requests captured" for one search capture attempt.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl API evidence with explicit HTTP status and payload details.

blockers.description: No hidden article fixture exists in current shared DB snapshot (article_display != 'y' count = 0).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried SQLite directly for hidden articles and checked a previously known hidden slug via UI/API; both confirmed not-found but did not provide a hidden-fixture case.
